name: Critical paragraphs — HANDOFF.md
why_it_exists: The 'most important discovery' paragraphs in the audit reports carry disproportionate weight — surfacing them as an index makes them searchable.

hits.text: **Evidence:** `/debug/cors` returns 404 (endpoint added in commit `429e3ac5` — not deployed). CORS preflight still returns `400 Disallowed CORS origin`.

curl https://crispro-backend-v2.onrender.com/debug/cors
# Must return JSON with "https://crispro-front-end.onrender.com" in allowed_origins list
```

This cost ~3 hours of debugging. The Render service runs:
```
uvicorn api.index:app
```
NOT `uvicorn main:app` (what `Procfile` and `render.yaml` say). The Render dashboard `startCommand` overrides both.

The backend is on Render's starter plan and hibernates. First request after hibernation returns `503` with header `x-render-routing: hibernate-wake-error`. This is not a code bug — retry after 5-10 seconds. The frontend should implement retry logic for this.

### 4E. `/debug/cors` endpoint needs to be removed
Commit `429e3ac5` added a `/debug/cors` endpoint that exposes the allowed origins list. Fine for debugging, should be removed before any public launch. One-line delete in `api/index.py`.

### `fjkiani/crispro-backend-v2`
| Commit | What it does | Status |
|--------|-------------|--------|
| `19ca3ad0` | Fix CORS in `main.py` (wrong file — irrelevant to prod) | Deployed but irrelevant |
| `b5a6f9f7` | Fix CORS in `main.py` with `_ALWAYS_ALLOWED` (still wrong file) | Deployed but irrelevant |
| `272d4351` | Set `ALLOWED_ORIGINS` in `render.yaml` (render.yaml env vars don't update existing services) | Deployed but ineffective |
| `b17ee064` | Fix `api/config.py` default list (right file, but env var in dashboard overrides it) | Deployed but overridden |
| `7c5026c7` | **THE REAL FIX** — `api/index.py` `_PRODUCTION_ORIGINS` hardcoded, env var can only add | **NOT YET DEPLOYED** |
| `429e3ac5` | Add `/debug/cors` diagnostic endpoint | **NOT YET DEPLOYED** |
